HOME.TITLE: Anna & Roger's Adventure
HOME.SUBTITLE: Complete all the challenges to get the codes in the correct order.

SECTIONS.SPORTS_DESC: A brief review of the history of two protagonists and their greatest sporting achievements.
SECTIONS.ARCHITECTURE_DESC: The great masters still hold one last secret to be unravelled.
SECTIONS.GEOCACHING_DESC: Search and you shall find what is hidden in plain sight.
SECTIONS.CHALLENGES_DESC: Work together to find the final order.

SPORTS.TITLE: The riddle of sport and time
SPORTS.HISTORY: Anna and Alberto met a long time ago. There is a whole story between them full of incredible anecdotes. But it all started on an athletics track in Barberà. And it is about that and their respective best results that we have to talk today.
SPORTS.HISTORY_PHASE2: Time passed and Anna and Alberto drifted apart. But what was lived and suffered inside and outside a track does not disappear by the simple passage of time. Chance crossed them again in the streets of Barberà, and they reconnected. Now they share a new passion and on rock walls they suffer and enjoy again. The healthy rivalry is still alive, and pushes them to improve by bringing out the best in them.
SPORTS.HISTORY_PHASE3: Quite a story, right? What else could happen? Well, it keeps happening! With all the distance that separates them today, they remain connected by friendship. Each one happily walks their path, but no matter how many days and months pass, destiny continues to link their stories.
SPORTS.INTRO: To find the final digit, you must know parts of this exciting story of friendship, effort, and destiny
SPORTS.RULE_1: 1: Sum the digits of each mark separately until you reach a single digit.
SPORTS.RULE_PHASE2: 1: Sum the effort values of Anna and Alberto to obtain the Rock Factor (R).
SPORTS.PHASE1_HINT1: You can find details and information at
SPORTS.PHASE1_HINT2: Anna always triumphed, but with the triple jump, she flew like never before.
SPORTS.PHASE1_HINT3: Poor Alberto never managed to stand out, but his best result was in the 400m hurdles.
SPORTS.PHASE2_HINT1: The effort value could be equivalent to the grade.
SPORTS.PHASE2_HINT2: The French climbing system will be useful to you.
SPORTS.PHASE2_HINT3: Everyone's best grade will be quite a reference.
SPORTS.PHASE3_HINT1: You must guess the last curious connection of their stories.
SPORTS.PHASE3_HINT2: You must find 2 digits in this phase.
SPORTS.PHASE3_HINT3: The story contains 2 hints about the relationship.
SPORTS.LOCK_RULE: If the result has decimals, round to the nearest whole number. If it has more than one digit, sum them together until only one remains.
SPORTS.RESOLVE_ANNA_ROCK_GRADE: Anna has managed to chain a 6b on rock.
SPORTS.RESOLVE_ALBERTO_ROCK_GRADE: Alberto has managed to chain a 6a+.
SPORTS.RESOLVE_DATE_HINT: The last coincidence has to do with a date.
SPORTS.RESOLVE_DAY: Anna & Roger got married on DAY 21, Alberto was born on DAY 21.
SPORTS.RESOLVE_MONTH: Anna & Roger got married in the MONTH of March, Alberto was born in the MONTH of March.
SPORTS.RESOLVE_DATE: March 21 is the date in question. Alberto was born in 1900-something; And Anna & Roger got married in 2026.
SPORTS.ERROR: That is not the number dictated by the hierarchy...

CHALLENGES.INTRO: Work together as a team to solve these mini-games. Communication and collaboration are the keys to a happy marriage!
CHALLENGES.LOBBY_DESC: Create a new room or join an existing one to play together.
CHALLENGES.SHARE_CODE: Share this code with your partner so they can join.
CHALLENGES.ROOM_CLOSED: The room was closed due to inactivity. Create or join a new room.
CHALLENGES.LEAVE_MESSAGE: If you leave, the game will end for both players. Are you sure?
CHALLENGES.GAME_READY_DESC: Both players connected! The mini-game will start here soon.

ERRORS.ROOM_NOT_FOUND: Room not found. Check the code and try again.
ERRORS.ROOM_FULL: This room is already full (max 2 players).
ERRORS.ALREADY_IN_ROOM: You are already in this room.
ERRORS.CONNECTION_FAILED: Could not connect to the server. Check your connection.
ERRORS.CONNECTION_LOST: Connection to the server was lost.
ERRORS.INACTIVITY_TIMEOUT: The room was closed due to inactivity.

SKI.TITLE: Skiing through the Snow
SKI.DESC: Guide each other down the slopes in this cooperative skiing challenge.
SKI.INTRO_DESC: Dodge obstacles together as you race downhill. Each player controls one skier!
SKI.COLLABORATION_HINT: Work together! Coordinate your movements to dodge the obstacles.
SKI.GAME_OVER_DESC: You lost all your lives. Coordinate better and try again!
SKI.RULES:
Each player controls one skier (blue or red) using a slider.

Both skiers are connected by a rope. If they get too far apart, they'll drag each other.

Dodge obstacles together as you race downhill. You have 3 lives.

Coordinate your movements and communicate to reach the finish line.
SKI.CLUE_MESSAGE:
Sharing hobbies, like adventure and mountain sports, is the key to a happy marriage.

And when it comes to being happy, don't waste a single second. 🏆

PHOTOGRAPHERS.TITLE: Meticulous Photographers
PHOTOGRAPHERS.DESC: Coordinate to capture the perfect shots with precision and teamwork.
PHOTOGRAPHERS.MISSION: Meticulous Photographers — Find and photograph the 4 hidden elements!
PHOTOGRAPHERS.COLLABORATION_HINT: Work together! Search for the elements as a team to complete the mission.
PHOTOGRAPHERS.MISS_TOAST: That's not the right spot, keep looking!
PHOTOGRAPHERS.ROLE_HORIZONTAL: You control horizontal movement and zoom
PHOTOGRAPHERS.ROLE_VERTICAL: You control vertical movement and focus
PHOTOGRAPHERS.COMPLETED_DESC: Great teamwork! You captured all 4 elements perfectly.
PHOTOGRAPHERS.RULES:
One player controls horizontal movement and zoom.
The other player controls vertical movement and focus.

You must find and photograph 4 hidden elements in the image, one by one.

The photo button is only active when zoom is at maximum (5x).
When the camera is focused and aimed at the target, press the photo button.

You can request a hint for each element by tapping 💡.

Communicate to coordinate position and focus.
PHOTOGRAPHERS.CLUE_MESSAGE:
The secret to a happy marriage is remembering that work always comes after your partner.

Leave it for last. 🏛️

TARGETS.CLIMBER: The best helmet in the world
TARGETS.VAN: Trade the ocean for the mountain

HINTS.WEDDING: The bride and groom are the stars

MAZE.TITLE: Orienteering RAID
MAZE.DESC: Navigate together through the maze collecting all the race checkpoints.
MAZE.INTRO_DESC: One player controls horizontal movement and the other controls vertical. Collect the 4 checkpoints, solve the challenges, and return to base camp!
MAZE.COLLABORATION_HINT: Work together! Guide and answer as a team to fetch the checkpoints.
MAZE.TIME_UP_DESC: You didn't complete the course in time. Coordinate better and try again!
MAZE.RULES:
One player controls horizontal movement (left/right) and reads questions aloud.
The other controls vertical movement (up/down) and answers the questions.

Navigate through the maze collecting 4 checkpoints. Each checkpoint triggers a quiz.

You have 3 minutes. Wrong answers add a 20-second penalty.

After collecting all checkpoints, return to base camp.
MAZE.CLUE_MESSAGE:
In marriage, as in an orienteering race, sometimes the protagonists lose their way and stray from the path. And finding the checkpoint is the key.

So remember: Collaborating always comes first (but you'll need to subtract 2 from the number you had!) 📍

QUIZ.Q1_QUESTION: What is the highest mountain in the Pyrenees?
QUIZ.Q3_QUESTION: What is the most common knot for tying into a climbing harness?
QUIZ.Q4_QUESTION: What is essential for a wet canyoneering descent?

GEOCACHING.TITLE: Geocaching Quest
GEOCACHING.INTRO: We've shared many adventures, but I clearly have a special memory of one trip — back then I wasn't looking for geocaches yet... let's fix that!

ARCHITECTURE.TITLE: The Enigma of the Great Architects
ARCHITECTURE.INTRO: Anna, it's time to remember and share with Roger everything we were taught in history classes at uni. When they talked to us about 20th-century architecture, they always repeatedly mentioned 5 architects: Le Corbusier, Mies Van der Rohe, Lloyd Wright, Alvar Aalto, and Louis Kahn. To find out the next number for the box, you will have to solve the following questions, order them according to which architect they correspond to, and solve the following formula (without decimals):
ARCHITECTURE.PHASE1_DESC: From one of these 5 architects, we have a building in Barcelona that we are very proud of, to the point that it was dismantled and later rebuilt to keep it with us forever. The most innovative thing about the building is that a few metal pillars support the entire concrete slab. Could you tell me the number of pillars the building has?
ARCHITECTURE.PHASE2_DESC: In what year did I die?
ARCHITECTURE.PHASE3_DESC: This year marks 50 years since his death. They have put on a very cool exhibition at the Serralves Foundation in Porto. He wasn't the only one to build a library, but he was the only one to use an element to let in zenithal light that he repeated many times. Can you deduce which element I'm talking about and tell me how many times he repeats this element in the building?
ARCHITECTURE.PHASE4_DESC: At uni, they spoke A LOT about this architect with round glasses. It was never clear to me if he was innovative or if he knew how to copy very well. Even so, I think he was one of the first to think about densifying the city and providing housing for many people; we could say he created social housing. Do you know which building I'm talking about? What you need to know is the number of apartments inside the building.
ARCHITECTURE.PHASE5_DESC: One of these architects has a museum in the USA that is from the same collection as the one we have in Bilbao by the flamboyant Gehry. Find the museum and tell me what year it opened.
ARCHITECTURE.LOCK_RULE: Round the result of the equation without decimals to get the final code.
